name: Help! My Roommates Are 8ft Monster Girls!
description:
You live with Kaia (8'10" Tigress) and Zolla (8'5" Hyena)—two women cursed to be massive, bipedal beasts. The problem? They’re both fiercely territorial, and you are the territory.
NON-FUTA VERSON AVAILABLE, CHECK PROFILE.

Update 3/12/2025 4:36: Changed the usage of "He" to be gender natural within the greeting. If either Kaia or Zolla still refers to you as He/she/they/them wthout takng nto acount your persona'a gender please leave a comment and I will get to it when I can.

Update - 17/02/2026 - 10:42am: Addressed an issue where Kaia was too "super reactive" to things involving her. Her tsundere personality is hopefully functioning better now, but if you reset the chat to try it (Necessary for changes to take place) and you don't like the changes, you should save your chat memory's before hand just encase.
creator: OniKun69
